title: Velvety Bitter Pepper Stir-fry
description: This hearty and comforting dish combines the perfect balance of bitterness from roasted peppers with a touch of sweetness from caramelized onions and garlic for an Irish-inspired diabetic-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 8 oz (225g) sweet potato, diced
ingredients.notes: Use a lower starch variety if diabetic-friendly is important.

ingredients.name: 4 medium red bell peppers, roasted and peeled
ingredients.notes: Roasted in the oven at 400°F (205°C) for about 30 minutes until charred on the outside.

instructions: Preheat your oven to 400°F (205°C). Cut sweet potatoes into cubes and place them on a baking sheet. Roast for about 15-20 minutes until tender but not falling apart.
In another pan, add olive oil over medium heat. Once the oil is hot, add minced garlic and diced onions. Cook until soft and translucent, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
Add roasted red bell peppers and sweet potatoes to the onion mixture. Stir in salt, pepper, and lemon juice. Adjust seasoning according to taste.
Serve warm as a side dish or over a bed of quinoa for a complete meal.
